series_metadata.series_title: Annexation and Community Entertainment District D5B Files
series_metadata.series_description: This file contains: copy of the petition for annexation with attached copy of plat of area annexed, official copy of city ordinance signed by city officials accepting the annexation of area as filed with Ohio Secretary of State, and a cover letter from the Secretary of State confirming the Annexation Report listing all Liquor Permit Premises found in the area, if any. C.E.D. investigation containing items specified in ORC 4301.80. (fna PM-208)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office area. These Records are permanent records. ; Microform: film converted Intellivue. Intellivue records on mainframe permanently
